message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -417,7 +417,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-vvmd.2.6","title":"Define fail-open semantics for unresolved path dependencies","description":"Specify and implement precise decision matrix: when to attempt remote build, when to trigger convergence/sync, and when to fallback locally. Must avoid silent partial sync behavior that can yield misleading build outcomes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Decision matrix explicitly defines when RCH must fail-open to local execution for unresolved path-dep states.
- Matrix covers timeout, policy-violation, unknown-state, and verifier-failure scenarios.
- Each decision path emits stable reason codes and operator remediation hints.
- Semantics guarantee no unsafe remote execution attempt when prerequisite confidence is insufficient.
- Unit/integration tests validate every matrix branch with deterministic assertions.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"JadeHare","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:03.849405866Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T22:31:21.770331022Z","closed_at":"2026-02-19T22:31:21.770312738Z","close_reason":"Completed: explicit fail-open decision matrix for unresolved path deps with reason-coded tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fail-open","path-deps","policy","rch-rel-2026q1"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.6","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:13.194937422Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.6","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:13.394997678Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.6","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.2.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:13.594874089Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-vvmd.2.7","title":"Add exhaustive unit tests for resolver/planner/hash edge cases","description":"Test cases: relative/absolute path deps, symlinked repos, missing manifests, cyclic references, duplicate crates, out-of-root paths, and hash invalidation behavior. Include detailed structured logs for failing fixture states.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Test suite covers resolver/planner/hash edge cases including empty closure, large closure, and alias collisions.
- Failure-path tests assert precise reason codes and no silent fallback ambiguities.
- Regression tests include fixtures for malformed manifests and stale closure fingerprints.
- Test harness outputs structured logs with scenario id, expected decision, and observed decision.
- CI wiring includes fast targeted suite and broader nightly edge-case sweep.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"JadeHare","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:04.053231372Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T22:31:29.203382312Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["path-deps","rch-rel-2026q1","tests","unit"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.7","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:13.791102461Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.7","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:13.989623615Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.7","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.2.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:14.194158900Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-vvmd.2.8","title":"Add E2E scenarios for real cross-repo Cargo path dependencies","description":"Implement end-to-end scenarios for real cross-repo Cargo path dependencies (for example project A depending on project B under `/data/projects`) using the shared reliability harness. Validate successful remote builds after convergence and correct fail-open local fallback when dependencies are unavailable or unverifiable.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Scenarios cover direct and transitive path dependencies, symlinked `/dp` alias usage, and out-of-root rejection behavior.
- Success-path scenarios verify deterministic remote build success with expected artifact sync.
- Failure-path scenarios verify fallback without local re-execution loops, with explicit reason codes.
- Logs include per-phase closure plan, verification results, worker decision, and fallback rationale.
- Scenarios are integrated into the shared E2E suite and runnable in CI/nightly tiers.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:04.256310490Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-16T17:18:02.603597667Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","path-deps","rch-rel-2026q1","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.8","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.2.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:18.602567803Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.8","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.2.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T17:17:38.462792646Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.8","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.7.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:18.806605035Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.8","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.7.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:33:13.312412741Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":203,"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.8","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Test-pyramid sequencing tightened: cross-repo path-dependency E2E now depends on edge-case unit coverage (bd-vvmd.2.7) to catch resolver/planner/hash corner cases early and keep E2E diagnostics focused on orchestration-level failures.","created_at":"2026-02-16T17:18:02Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-vvmd.2.9","title":"Add command-classification regression suite to protect non-compilation UX","description":"Add a dedicated regression suite to ensure new reliability logic does not degrade command classification behavior or accidentally intercept commands that must stay local. Focus on preserving user expectations for pass-through behavior while still capturing intended compilation offload cases.\n\n## Acceptance Criteria\n- Unit tests cover positive/negative classification for cargo/gcc/clang/make/ninja/bun patterns, including watch/piped/redirected/backgrounded exclusions.\n- Regression tests explicitly assert local pass-through for non-compilation and package-management commands (including bun install/add/remove/link, bun run/build/dev/repl, bunx).\n- Hook-mode integration tests verify fail-open behavior when classifier/preflight timing budgets are exceeded or preconditions are ambiguous.\n- E2E scenarios confirm no unintended remote interception side effects on representative real workflows.\n- Structured logs include classifier rationale, confidence, decision path, and fallback reason codes for every scenario.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:55:04.705571391Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-16T16:58:17.143089002Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["classification","e2e","fail-open","rch-rel-2026q1","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.9","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.2.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:58:01.129835548Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.9","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:58:01.329762751Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.9","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.7.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:58:01.737484699Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.9","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.7.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:58:01.533601438Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":174,"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.9","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Critical user-trust guardrail: this regression suite prevents accidental interception of commands that must stay local. Coverage must include positive compilation detection, explicit non-compilation pass-through, timeout/ambiguity fail-open behavior, and reason-coded decision telemetry so operators can explain every intercept/fallback decision.","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:58:17Z"}]}
+{"id":"bd-vvmd.2.9","title":"Add command-classification regression suite to protect non-compilation UX","description":"Add a dedicated regression suite to ensure new reliability logic does not degrade command classification behavior or accidentally intercept commands that must stay local. Focus on preserving user expectations for pass-through behavior while still capturing intended compilation offload cases.\n\n## Acceptance Criteria\n- Unit tests cover positive/negative classification for cargo/gcc/clang/make/ninja/bun patterns, including watch/piped/redirected/backgrounded exclusions.\n- Regression tests explicitly assert local pass-through for non-compilation and package-management commands (including bun install/add/remove/link, bun run/build/dev/repl, bunx).\n- Hook-mode integration tests verify fail-open behavior when classifier/preflight timing budgets are exceeded or preconditions are ambiguous.\n- E2E scenarios confirm no unintended remote interception side effects on representative real workflows.\n- Structured logs include classifier rationale, confidence, decision path, and fallback reason codes for every scenario.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:55:04.705571391Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-22T00:52:46.134713580Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["classification","e2e","fail-open","rch-rel-2026q1","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.9","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.2.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:58:01.129835548Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.9","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:58:01.329762751Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.9","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.7.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:58:01.737484699Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.9","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.7.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:58:01.533601438Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":174,"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.2.9","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Critical user-trust guardrail: this regression suite prevents accidental interception of commands that must stay local. Coverage must include positive compilation detection, explicit non-compilation pass-through, timeout/ambiguity fail-open behavior, and reason-coded decision telemetry so operators can explain every intercept/fallback decision.","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:58:17Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-vvmd.3","title":"Workstream: Fleet Repo Convergence via repo_updater Integration","description":"Purpose: integrate `/data/projects/repo_updater` so workers maintain the convex hull of repos required by active/local development graphs. Build a daemon-level convergence service that verifies required repos exist before builds, synchronizes drift safely, and provides operator-visible status/remediation. This reduces missing-repo failures and startup latency for cross-repo local development.

## Success Criteria
- Adapter contract and policy allowlist constrain convergence to trusted roots and deterministic APIs.
- Convergence state machine and selection prechecks prevent missing/stale repo build failures.
- Background drift reconciliation and operator repair flows are available and observable.
- Repo-convergence unit/integration/E2E coverage is complete and deterministic.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:00.627230907Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-16T16:40:14.107266701Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["rch","rch-rel-2026q1","repo-sync","repo_updater","workers"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.3","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:11.793591119Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.3","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.3.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:24:21.606944357Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.3","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.3.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:24:21.810214112Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.3","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.3.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:24:22.098985483Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.3","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.3.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:33:36.037914260Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.3","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.3.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:40:14.107177544Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":132,"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Integration principle: use repo_updater as source-of-truth synchronizer for repo presence/freshness, while RCH owns scheduling-time policy decisions. This centralizes sync logic and minimizes custom drift-management code in RCH.","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:20:21Z"},{"id":143,"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Operational model: workers should hold the convex hull of repos needed by active build demand, not an unbounded mirror of everything. Convergence must be bounded by timeouts/rate limits and policy allowlist, with drift visibility in status surfaces. Pre-build selection checks are required to avoid known-missing-repo failures. If convergence cannot complete safely in budget, fallback locally and surface precise remediation.","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:28:02Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-vvmd.3.1","title":"Define repo_updater adapter contract (commands, JSON schema, errors)","description":"Design stable integration boundary with repo_updater/ru: required commands, expected JSON outputs, failure taxonomy, timeout/retry behavior, and idempotency guarantees. Include version compatibility strategy and fallback behavior if adapter unavailable.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Adapter contract specifies command surface, JSON schema, timeout budgets, and retry semantics.
- Contract documents authentication, host validation, and trust boundaries for repo_updater interactions.
- Error mapping normalizes adapter failures into RCH taxonomy with remediation guidance.
- Mockable adapter interface supports deterministic unit/integration tests.
- Contract includes explicit versioning and compatibility expectations for future updates.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:04.457858732Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-16T21:15:18.292823228Z","closed_at":"2026-02-16T21:15:18.092230052Z","close_reason":"Completed: implemented repo_updater adapter contract module with schema/version/trust/fallback/error mapping, mock adapter interface, docs, and e2e contract test script.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["contract","integration","rch-rel-2026q1","repo_updater"],"comments":[{"id":215,"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.3.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Paused while triage elevates bd-vvmd.5.1 as highest-impact actionable pick from bv --robot-next.","created_at":"2026-02-16T20:57:49Z"},{"id":217,"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.3.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented in rch-common/src/repo_updater_contract.rs and wired via rch-common/src/lib.rs. Added docs/architecture/repo_updater_adapter_contract.md and tests/e2e/repo_updater_contract.sh. Validation run: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --workspace --all-targets, cargo clippy -p rch-common --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test -p rch-common repo_updater_contract_ -- --nocapture, tests/e2e/repo_updater_contract.sh. Note: workspace-wide clippy still has pre-existing blocker in rch/src/commands/daemon.rs (items_after_test_module).","created_at":"2026-02-16T21:15:18Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-vvmd.3.2","title":"Implement daemon RepoConvergence service (convex-hull repo set + drift detection)","description":"Create service that computes required repo hull for active builds, compares worker state, and drives convergence actions through the adapter. Must expose drift state and convergence outcomes for scheduling decisions.

## Acceptance Criteria
- RepoConvergence service computes and tracks required repo convex-hull state per scheduling context.
- Service maintains explicit drift states with deterministic transitions and hysteresis rules.
- Convergence decisions are bounded by time/attempt budgets to preserve fail-open behavior.
- Service emits structured state-change events for observability and operator tooling.
- Integration tests validate healthy convergence, partial drift, auth failures, and stale-state recovery.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:04.663944951Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-18T00:35:05.704331106Z","closed_at":"2026-02-18T00:35:05.704256056Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["convergence","daemon","rch-rel-2026q1","repo_updater"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:14.599381364Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:19:14.397218582Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-vvmd.3.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:40:13.484662133Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":149,"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.3.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"RepoConvergence service should expose deterministic states (ready, drifting, converging, failed, stale) with timestamps and reason codes. Keep convergence idempotent and bounded per worker to avoid starvation. Include explicit separation between policy decisions and execution so dry-run/status surfaces can use the same core logic.","created_at":"2026-02-16T16:28:24Z"},{"id":222,"issue_id":"bd-vvmd.3.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Progress update: wired additional repo_updater convergence command surface into runtime path in rch hook pre-sync flow. Added command-aware idempotency keys and execution sequencing: SyncDryRun (read-only preflight) -> SyncApply (mutating convergence) -> StatusNoFetch (post-apply snapshot), all with strict fail-open behavior on validation/transport/adapter errors. Added helper coverage tests: test_repo_updater_command_name_is_stable and test_build_repo_sync_idempotency_key_for_command_distinguishes_commands. Validation performed: cargo fmt --check; cargo check --workspace --all-targets; cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings; cargo test --workspace --all-targets; tests/e2e/path_dependency_fixtures.sh; tests/e2e/repo_updater_contract.sh.","created_at":"2026-02-17T01:59:04Z"}]}
